description: Beacon proxies rely on a beacon address that determines implementation. If the beacon upgrade function lacks proper access control or timelock, an attacker can point all proxies to malicious code, taking over state and funds.
name: Unauthenticated Beacon Upgrade
remediation: - Restrict beacon upgrades to multisig+timelock and emit events on change. - Validate new implementation bytecode (e.g., initializer disabled, interfaces intact). - Monitor beacon address changes on-chain with alerts.
